mapper.select: SELECT SEQNO , TITLE , CAST(W_DATE AS VARCHAR(10)) AS W_DATE , CAST(EVT_S_DATE AS VARCHAR(10)) AS EVT_S_DATE , CAST(EVT_S_TIME AS VARCHAR(2)) AS EVT_S_TIME , CAST(EVT_E_DATE AS VARCHAR(10)) AS EVT_E_DATE , CAST(EVT_E_TIME AS VARCHAR(2)) AS EVT_E_TIME , ATTFILE_DTL_IMG , ATTFILE_DTL_URL , ATTFILE_SNL_IMG , ATTFILE_SNL_URL , CTGRY_CD FROM MA30_BBS_EVENT_MGT WHERE LOCTN_CD=#{loctnCd} AND D_FLAG='Z00001' AND APP_STATUS = 'PF4005' AND CTGRY_CD IN ('EV0010', 'EV0020') AND EVT_FLAG = 'Y' AND (CONCAT(REPLACE(S_DATE, '-', ''), S_TIME) <= VARCHAR_FORMAT(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24') ) AND (CONCAT(REPLACE(E_DATE, '-', ''), E_TIME) >= VARCHAR_FORMAT(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24') ) AND UPPER(TITLE) LIKE UPPER('%'||#{searchWord}||'%') ORDER BY SEQNO DESC WITH UR

SELECT CGTRY_CD ,(SELECT CD_NM FROM SUB_CD WHERE CMMN_CD='SHM' AND CMMN_CD||SUB_CD = TRIM(CGTRY_CD)) AS CTGRY_NM ,CONTENTS FROM MA30_SERVICE_HOUR_MGT WHERE 1=1 AND LOCTN_CD = #{language} AND CGTRY_CD IN ( 'SHM001' ,'SHM002' ,'SHM003' ,'SHM004' ,'SHM005' ,'SHM006' ,'SHM007' ,'SHM008' ,'SHM009' ,'SHM010' ,'SHM011' ,'SHM012' ,'SHM013' ) AND APP_STATUS = 'PF4005' ORDER BY REGIST_DT DESC WITH UR
